name: Maintenance Report
about: Report maintenance tasks or housekeeping items
title: "[MAINTENANCE] "
labels: ["maintenance"]
assignees: ''
---

## 🔧 Maintenance Description
A clear and concise description of the maintenance task that needs to be performed.

## 📋 Task Type
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Dependency updates
- [ ] Documentation updates
- [ ] Performance optimization
- [ ] Security improvements
- [ ] Testing improvements
- [ ] CI/CD improvements
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## 🎯 Objectives
What are the specific goals of this maintenance task?

## 📊 Impact Assessment
- **Scope**: [e.g. Single module, Multiple modules, Entire codebase]
- **Risk Level**: [Low/Medium/High]
- **Estimated Effort**: [e.g. 1-2 hours, 1-2 days, 1 week+]
- **Breaking Changes**: [Yes/No]

## 🔄 Implementation Plan
1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Step 3

## 🧪 Testing Strategy
How will this maintenance task be tested?
- [ ] Unit tests
- [ ] Integration tests
- [ ] Manual testing
- [ ] Performance testing
- [ ] Security testing

## 📚 Documentation Updates
What documentation needs to be updated as part of this maintenance?
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] API documentation
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] User guides
- [ ] Developer documentation

## 📈 Success Metrics
How will we know this maintenance task was successful?

## ⚠️ Risks and Considerations
Are there any risks or special considerations we should be aware of?

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] I have assessed the impact and risk level of this maintenance task
- [ ] I have considered the testing strategy required
- [ ] I have identified any documentation that needs updating
- [ ] I have estimated the effort required for completion
- [ ] I have followed the repository's contribution guidelines
